consistency.name_vs_slug: Consistent. 'Dust of Sneezing and Choking' matches the slug.
consistency.type_vs_source: Consistent. Declared 'Wondrous item' and confirmed in 'source_type_rarity'.

quality.description_clarity: High. The description clearly details the appearance, the false identification result (mimicking *dust of disappearance*), the activation cost (action, one use), the area of effect (30 feet), the save DC (15 Constitution), and the resulting conditions (unable to breathe, incapacitated, suffocating).
quality.mechanical_completeness: Complete. Includes saving throw, DC, duration/ending conditions (repeat save, *lesser restoration*), and status effects.

mechanics.identification_trick: Good flavor element; it mimics *dust of disappearance* upon initial identification.
mechanics.area_of_effect: 30-foot radius centered on the user when thrown.
mechanics.target_restriction: Applies only to creatures that need to breathe.
mechanics.save_and_repeat: DC 15 CON save to avoid initially. Creatures can repeat the save at the end of each turn while conscious to end the effect on themselves.
mechanics.balance_notes: Uncommon rarity seems appropriate for a single-use area control item that imposes two debilitating conditions (Incapacitated and Suffocating) via a moderate DC save (DC 15).
